summary: Excellent audience recording, praised as one of the finest sources for this show.
review: The reviewer rates this B‑n‑K 4011 effort five stars, calling it wonderful and tying it with the Brotman source as the two best sounding versions. No comments are made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights superb audio quality, but provides no insight into the musical performance; therefore the rating leans heavily on recording excellence while confidence remains moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as wonderful and among the finest sounding audience sources available.
